summary: Full stack testing of Multi-Sport League Platform. Fixed 3 critical bugs: (1) POST /api/leagues 307 redirect (trailing slash issue), (2) CORS credentials mismatch (wildcard origin), (3) AdminDashboard/PlayerDashboard loading state race condition causing redirect to /auth. All 19 backend tests pass. Key UI flows working after fixes.

minor.issue: Unauthenticated users see 401 errors in console from /api/leagues/my endpoint - should be silently skipped when not logged in

integration_issues.issue: Playwright button click selector (button:has-text('Log In')) doesn't submit form - pressing Enter on password field works. The button click may have z-index/form issue.

issues: Only shows USA users, not India - because seeded admin is USA only. Not a bug but initial data gap

action_items: Login button click not triggering form submit in some contexts - verify button type='submit' in Auth.jsx form
Minor: /api/leagues/my returns 401 for unauthenticated requests - frontend should not call this endpoint when user is not logged in
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: POST /api/leagues was returning 307 redirect (trailing slash) - fixed by adding @router.get('') and @router.post('') alongside '/' routes in league_routes.py and setting redirect_slashes=False on api_router
FIXED: CORS_ORIGINS='*' with allow_credentials=True is invalid per CORS spec - changed to specific origin in backend/.env
FIXED: AdminDashboard and PlayerDashboard did not check 'loading' state before redirecting - user was 'undefined' on direct navigation causing redirect to /auth
Auth uses httpOnly cookies (secure=False) - cookies are correctly set and passed for same-domain requests
Seed creates admin with 'seed_admin' but does NOT update existing admin's role if already exists - idempotent update only updates password hash
seed_data_creation: TEST_user1@example.com registered. TEST_New League and TEST_Fix Check leagues created during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth uses httpOnly cookies (same-domain). Login works via keyboard Enter on password field. Admin dashboard now accessible via direct URL navigation after loading fix. All 8 seeded leagues visible. Backend POST /api/leagues now correctly creates leagues (was 307 redirect issue). CORS fixed to specific origin.

rca_of_issues.307_redirect: FastAPI by default redirects /api/leagues (no trailing slash) to /api/leagues/ (with slash) via 307 redirect. But 307 preserves the method so POST becomes GET on redirect. Fixed by adding redirect_slashes=False on APIRouter and registering routes on both '' and '/'.
rca_of_issues.cors_credentials: backend/.env had CORS_ORIGINS='*'. When allow_credentials=True + allow_origins=['*'], FastAPI CORSMiddleware emits Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * which browsers reject for credentialed requests. Fixed to specific frontend URL.
rca_of_issues.loading_state_redirect: AdminDashboard/PlayerDashboard checked !user without checking loading state. On direct URL navigation, user starts as undefined (loading), !undefined=true triggers redirect before fetchMe() completes. Fixed by checking loading state first.
